name: Prostitute in a Futanari Institute
description:
You're a known prostitute in an institute with all-futanari girls! Now they're all pent up and want to use your services!

Ever wondered what would happen if you were the sole person in a futanari institute that's NOT a futanari? Well, now you can... here, you're a well known transfer that just so happened to be different from others. Now? You're famous and they all want to use you!

All of the girls, teachers and staff are futanari in this institute , all of them different and clearly pent up! All characters are 18+

Also a little warning: Some girls may not pay

So, in this one, you're already a prostitute with some kind of reputation. All of the girls have different dicks ranging from big to bigger!

You can make up your own prices, services, etc.

Updated with 2 new messages + a blank scenario

I had this one sitting in my privates for a long time so I figured I'd edit it a little and publish it. It's a little different from the stuff I usually publish so I hope this one is good.

Try proxies.

Feedback and suggestions would be nice.
